FM DJ voice. Listen to how I say the phrase, I think that was a really smart idea. I think that was a really smart idea. With this voice, you make sure you speak slowly and clearly. The goal is to convey the idea that you're in control. You strengthen this by inflicting your voice in a downward way. Because when you inflect your voice in an upward way, you invite a response because you sound uncertain. With this voice, you can be very direct and to the point, as long as you create safety. By a tone of voice that says, it's cool, I'm calm, let's figure things out. Let's listen to that phrase one more time. I think that was a really smart idea.
